task_objective: Fix runtime behavior after Steam Deck testing showed the frontend loads but does not successfully interface with Ludusavi or show useful plugin logs.
tests_added: tests/test_service.py lazy Ludusavi adapter initialization cases
tests/test_frontend_static.py initial log loading order assertion
design_decisions: Removed Decky's _root flag so the backend runs as the Decky user and the Ludusavi Flatpak sees the user's configuration and backup metadata.
Changed SDHLudusaviService to create the real Ludusavi adapter lazily during locked Ludusavi operations instead of at service startup.
Kept settings, status, and recent-log calls available even when Ludusavi or Flatpak discovery fails.
Changed initial frontend loading to fetch recent logs after refresh so dependency errors recorded during refresh are visible in the log modal.
results: ./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ passed
./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 51 tests
./run.sh uv run python scripts/package_plugin.py rebuilt out/SDH-ludusavi.zip
